clip_summary: The clip begins with the goalkeeper in orange, positioned near the left side of the penalty area, kicking the ball upfield. The ball travels towards the center of the pitch, where players in white and blue jerseys converge. A player in a white jersey gains possession and dribbles the ball towards the right side of the field, advancing into the attacking third. The key moment is the build-up play as the white team moves the ball into a dangerous area, with multiple players from both teams converging around the penalty box.
baseline: The teams are passing the ball around in midfield.
improved: Wide view at midfield: England in white and Croatia in blue are spread across the central third, with the ball moving through open play.

candidates.label: Tactical

clip_summary: England, in white, has possession of the ball in the attacking third, near the center of the pitch. An England player attempts a shot on goal from just outside the penalty area, which is blocked by a Croatia defender. The ball then deflects towards the right side of the penalty box, where another England player gathers it and attempts a second shot, which is also blocked by a Croatia defender.

improved: England move near Croatia’s penalty area, with several blue defenders between the ball and goal. The danger is a pass or cross into the crowded box.

clip_summary: Harry Kane prepares to take a penalty kick for England against Croatia in the FIFA World Cup 2026. The clip shows Kane in close-up composing himself, then standing over the ball on the penalty spot with the Croatian goalkeeper on the goal line. The clip ends before the kick is taken — this is the moment of anticipation before the penalty.
baseline: England have a free kick near Croatia's goal.
improved: Harry Kane stands over a free kick just outside Croatia's penalty area. Croatia's wall is set and defenders mark runners, while Kane measures his run-up — a direct shot on goal or a precise delivery into the crowded box is seconds away.

candidates.label: Spatial
candidates.description: Kane stands at the penalty spot, 12 yards from goal, ball centered, as the Croatian keeper waits on the goal line.

candidates.label: Tactical
candidates.description: Kane stands over the ball, a solitary figure against the Croatian keeper, who is spread wide on his line, trying to fill the goal and intimidate the England captain.
